use_cases: Displaying user-friendly 404 error pages when content is not found
Handling missing routes in web applications
Providing visual feedback with avatar for empty or error states
Improving user experience when links are broken or pages don't exist
ai_summary: A 404 Not Found error page component featuring a stylized avatar display, designed to communicate missing content to users in a visually appealing way. Built with Radix UI primitives and styled with Tailwind CSS for a clean, modern appearance that fits any application.
